themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God.

themes.label: Righteousness
themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God.

themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart.

themes.label: Faith/Belief
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes trust, belief, confidence, or steadfast reliance on God.

themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ.

themes.label: Guidance
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes leading, direction, teaching, or the path God sets before His people.
